title: orchis brevicornis subsp. fallax
intro: Orchis brevicornis subsp. fallax is a type of orchid, specifically a subspecies of the Autumn lady's tresses plant, native to the Iberian Peninsula and parts of North Africa. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a diuretic and to reduce inflammation. In herbal medicine, preparations from this plant are believed to provide health benefits, such as relieving urinary tract issues, lowering blood pressure, and treating respiratory problems. Traditionally, the plant has been used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
